stories.title: Follow live: Spain, Argentina searching for first ...
Fox birdies difficult 18th to pass Young, win Open...
stories.summary: Ryan Fox birdied four of the final six holes at Royal Birkdale, including the difficult 18th hole, to win the Open Championship by one stroke over Cameron Young.

stories.title: Reese 'grateful' to WNBA for Brondello suspension
stories.summary: Angel Reese said she appreciated Sandy Brondello's apology for referring to her as a "protected species" but also was grateful to the WNBA for suspending Brondello for one game.

stories.title: Lucky 13: BoSox tie their 2nd-longest win streak
stories.summary: Willson Contreras hit a two-run homer, Sonny Gray gave up one run and five hits over six innings, and the Red Sox beat the Rays 6-1 on Sunday for their 13th win in a row.

stories.title: Bueckers nets 25, exits Wings' win after collision...
stories.summary: Paige Bueckers had 25 points before leaving following a scary collision, Arike Ogunbowale scored six of her 20 down the stretch, and the Wings defeated the Sparks 90-82 on Sunday to extend their winning streak to a franchise-record six games.
